languages.text: "Я рекомендую вам соблюдать все мыслимые предосторожности, Ваша Светлость". {n}Янрис шумно вздыхает, обретая сосредоточенность.{/n} "Династические тайны могут оказаться весьма небезопасными".
"I advise you to take every conceivable precaution, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janris sighs heavily, steeling himself.{/n} "Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous."
languages.original_text: "Я рекомендую вам соблюдать все мыслимые предосторожности, Ваша Светлость". {n}Янрис шумно вздыхает, обретая сосредоточенность.{/n} "Династические тайны могут оказаться весьма небезопасными".

traits.locale_text: "I advise you to take every conceivable precaution, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janris sighs heavily, steeling himself.{/n} "Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous."

"I advise you to take every conceivable precaution, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janris sighs heavily, steeling himself.{/n} Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous. Duty dictates that I escort you inside."

"I advise you to take every conceivable precaution, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janris sighs heavily, steeling himself.{/n} Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous. Duty dictates that I escort you inside."
"I advise you to take every conceivable precaution, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janris sighs heavily, steeling himself.{/n} "Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous."

languages.text: «Le recomiendo que tome todas las precauciones que pueda, mi{mf|lord|lady}». {n}Janris suspira profundamente, preparándose.{/n} «Los secretos de la dinastía no están exentos de peligro».
languages.original_text: "I advise you to take every conceivable precaution, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janris sighs heavily, steeling himself.{/n} "Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous."

traits.locale_text: «Le recomiendo que tome todas las precauciones que pueda, mi{mf|lord|lady}». {n}Janris suspira profundamente, preparándose.{/n} «Los secretos de la dinastía no están exentos de peligro».

languages.text: “我建议您采取一切可能的防范措施，大人。”{n}詹里斯重重叹了口气，定了定神。{/n}“王朝的秘密往往伴随着巨大的危险。”
languages.original_text: "I advise you to take every conceivable precaution, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janris sighs heavily, steeling himself.{/n} "Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous."

traits.locale_text: “我建议您采取一切可能的防范措施，大人。”{n}詹里斯重重叹了口气，定了定神。{/n}“王朝的秘密往往伴随着巨大的危险。”

languages.text: « À votre place, je redoublerais de prudence, Votre Seigneurie, » {n}songe Janris avec un profond soupir, comme pour rassembler son courage.{/n} « Les secrets de la dynastie ne sont pas toujours sans danger. »
languages.original_text: "I advise you to take every conceivable precaution, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janris sighs heavily, steeling himself.{/n} "Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous."

traits.locale_text: « À votre place, je redoublerais de prudence, Votre Seigneurie, » {n}songe Janris avec un profond soupir, comme pour rassembler son courage.{/n} « Les secrets de la dynastie ne sont pas toujours sans danger. »

languages.text: "Düşünülebilecek her türlü önlemi almanızı tavsiye ederim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri." {n}Janris, kendini hazırlayarak derin bir iç çekiyor.{/n} "Hanedanlık sırları, tehlikeli olmaktan çok daha fazlası olabilir."
languages.original_text: "I advise you to take every conceivable precaution, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janris sighs heavily, steeling himself.{/n} "Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous."

traits.locale_text: "Düşünülebilecek her türlü önlemi almanızı tavsiye ederim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri." {n}Janris, kendini hazırlayarak derin bir iç çekiyor.{/n} "Hanedanlık sırları, tehlikeli olmaktan çok daha fazlası olabilir."

languages.text: 「あらゆる可能な予防策を講じることをお勧めします、御{mf|殿|女}。」{n}ジャンリスは深くため息をつき、覚悟を決めた。{/n}「王家の秘密は、少し危険なだけでなく、非常に危険な場合もあります。」
languages.original_text: "I advise you to take every conceivable precaution, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janris sighs heavily, steeling himself.{/n} "Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous."

traits.locale_text: 「あらゆる可能な予防策を講じることをお勧めします、御{mf|殿|女}。」{n}ジャンリスは深くため息をつき、覚悟を決めた。{/n}「王家の秘密は、少し危険なだけでなく、非常に危険な場合もあります。」

languages.text: "Ich rate Euch, jede erdenkliche Vorsichtsmaßnahme zu ergreifen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}." {n}Janris seufzt schwer und wappnet sich.{/n} "Dynastische Geheimnisse können ausgesprochen gefährlich sein."
languages.original_text: "I advise you to take every conceivable precaution, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janris sighs heavily, steeling himself.{/n} "Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous."

traits.locale_text: "Ich rate Euch, jede erdenkliche Vorsichtsmaßnahme zu ergreifen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}." {n}Janris seufzt schwer und wappnet sich.{/n} "Dynastische Geheimnisse können ausgesprochen gefährlich sein."
